examples: He recalls his native Bombay with cinematic exactness.
As exactness is kindness, he was exact.
Some non-integral values, like dollars-and-cents decimals, require exactness.
Roth can evoke an unknown place and time with an exactness of sensory detail that is particularly alive to sounds and to changing light.
Given this, it is hard to believe that with the advent of the Obama administration, we are seeing history repeat itself with nearly unheard of exactness.
